ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty of the job */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the job */,
  "estimated_weekly_total" REAL /* Estimated weekly total pay for the job */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "duration_weeks" INTEGER /* Duration of the job in weeks */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours per week for the job */,
  "compact_state" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the job is in a compact state */,
  "walkthrough_state" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the job is in a walkthrough state */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., Open, Recently Filled, Available) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was last updated */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Required certifications for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered for the job */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter managing the job */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for job applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_shift_type FOREIGN KEY ("shift_type") REFERENCES shift_types ("shift_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES job_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty (e.g., Stepdown - General, Stepdown - Cardiac) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "required_experience" TEXT /* Minimum required experience for the specialty */,
  "associated_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications associated with the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Virginia, Idaho) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shift_types" (
  "shift_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift type */,
  "shift_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift type (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shift type */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the job status (e.g., Open, Recently Filled, Available) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "recruiter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recruiter (e.g., Senior Recruiter, Junior Recruiter) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the recruiter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recruiter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recruiter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job applied to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the application */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled interview */,
  "interviewer" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter conducting the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_interviewer FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job related to the communication */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate involved in the communication */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter involved in the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., Email, Phone Call) */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job whose status changed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the status change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES job_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
